channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: StrelaStealer — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with strelastealer .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: XWorm — 6 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with xworm .

ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .

🔍 Cybersecurity Quiz Time! 🔍 What's a "zero-day" vulnerability in cybersecurity? A) A fully patched software flaw B) An outdated encryption method C) An unseen bug with no fix yet D) A publicized hacker strategy Comment your answer below! #CyberSecurity - x.com

I got asked on the news today is Cybersecurity a field that is being impacted by AI or is it a safe field? I explained how I struggle with this personally as well - there's a lot of fear, uncertainty and doubt in every technology market right now, but I'm extremely optim - x.com

🚨 Security Alert: SQL Server Zero-Day (CVE-2026-21262) A newly disclosed vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to escalate privileges to SQL sysadmin level, putting sensitive databases at risk. 🔗 cybersecuritynews.com/microsoft-sql-… #CyberSecurit - x.com

🚨 STOP SCROLLING 🚨 A zero-day vulnerability is being actively exploited. Microsoft patched 78 issues this month. If you haven’t updated, you may be exposed. Need urgent help? #ThreatAlert #ZeroDay #CyberSecurity #PatchTuesday #ITSecurity #Business - x.com
